ns0:entry.ns0:title: Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
Language: python
Use claude code and codex for free in the terminal, VSCode extension, and discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
Language: python
The agent that grows with you

ns0:entry.ns0:title: THUDM/slime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/THUDM/slime
Language: python
slime is an LLM post-training framework for RL Scaling.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
Language: python
LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/deer-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
Language: python
An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: calesthio/OpenMontage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/calesthio/OpenMontage
Language: python
World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chopratejas/headroom
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chopratejas/headroom
Language: python
Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mikumifa/biliTickerBuy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mikumifa/biliTickerBuy
Language: python
b站会员购购票辅助工具

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
Language: python
754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0

ns0:entry.ns0:title: public-apis/public-apis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/public-apis/public-apis
Language: python
A collective list of free APIs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: smicallef/spiderfoot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/smicallef/spiderfoot
Language: python
SpiderFoot automates OSINT for threat intelligence and mapping your attack surface.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: topoteretes/cognee
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/topoteretes/cognee
Language: python
Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.
